headline: Merck KGaA to acquire Bio-Techne in $11.3 billion deal
summary: The deal, Merck's largest since its Sigma-Aldrich buyout, expands its presence in proteins, spatial biology, and cell and gene therapy

headline: Bio-Techne (TECH) Agrees To $11.5 Billion Merck KGaA Buyout
summary: Merck KGaA has agreed to acquire Bio-Techne (NasdaqGS:TECH) for $11.5b in an all cash deal. Bio-Techne's board has unanimously approved the transaction, which is now subject to regulatory review. The companies highlight expected synergies and accretion to Merck KGaA’s earnings following completion. For investors tracking Bio-Techne, the agreed $11.5b acquisition by Merck KGaA lands after a sharp move in the stock, with NasdaqGS:TECH up 22% over the past week and 47% over the past month. The...

headline: Stephens & Co. Downgrades Bio-Techne to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $73
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Steven Etoch   downgrades Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $68 to $73.

headline: Bio-Techne To Pay Termination Fee Of $230.5M To Merck KGaA In Event That Deal Isn't Consummated; Merck KGaA To Pay Fee Of $576.1M If Deal Terminated
summary: Termination Fees The Company will be required to pay to Parent a termination fee equal to $230,455,000 (the "Company Termination Fee"): ·    If (A) the Merger Agreement is validly terminated (i) by either Parent

headline: Germany’s Merck Pumps Up Life Sciences Biz with $11.3B Bio-Techne Deal
summary: Merck KGaA's agreement to buy Bio-Techne for $11.3 billion strengthens its hold in life sciences, especially drug discovery and gene therapy.

headline: Bio-Techne (TECH) Soars 20% on Merck $11.3B Merger
summary: Bio-Techne Corp. (NASDAQ:TECH) is one of the 9 Stocks Winning by Double Digits. Bio-Techne rallied for a third straight day on Thursday, surging 20.08 percent to close at $70.70 apiece, as investors gobbled up shares following news that it is merging with pharmaceutical giant Merck for $11.3 billion. In a statement, Bio-Techne Corp. (NASDAQ:TECH) said […]
